title: NoLoadingTerrain
description: A small mod that gets rid of the "Loading Terrain" screen.
body:
![NoLoadingTerrain logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/651b597d8d8dccfaccdcd5b3db8665241401fe53.png)
# NoLoadingTerrain
This small mod removes the "Loading Terrain" screen that is shown when changing dimensions or servers (in a server network).
Note that this may make close to no difference on more high-end hardware.
